selected_title: Enhancing the innovation capability in the organization: A conceptual framework
question: What mechanism does Zeinolabedin Rahmani identify in “Enhancing the innovation capability in the organization: A conceptual framework” that deepens the evidence from “Opening the box of knowledge in absorptive capacity development in the context of service innovation”?

evidence_spans.text: The purpose of this paper is to contribute to the existing knowledge in the field of innovation by exploring two important antecedents of social capital which may contribute to make an increase in the level of absorptive capacity and innovation outcomes of absorptive capacity including innovation capabilities. These antecedents are organizational context and managerial behavior. A conceptual framework synthesized from a review of the literature is offered. With the help of the proposed model not only the links between variables can be viewed graphically but also organizations will learn that how they can improve their absorptive capacity and innovation activities through high level of social capital.

learned_claims: The inspected source addresses Absorptive capacity, Knowledge management through the evidence summarized in the preserved span.
The abstract supplies a direct evidence span of 106 words; interpretation remains bounded to that span.
